title: Zoro Spear Bridge
description: Adds 1.21.11 Spear Models into Backwards Compatible 1.21.11 Servers
body:
On many minecraft servers there is a plugin called ViaBackwards enablign players from older versions to play on the server however with newer items such as the Spear they show up as a sword! This mod fixes it by checking if the item is named:
- "1.21.11 Wooden Spear"
- "1.21.11 Stone Spear"
- "1.21.11 Diamond Spear"
- "1.21.11 Golden Spear"
- "1.21.11 Copper Spear"
- "1.21.11 Iron Spear"
- "1.21.11 Netherite Spear"
If so it changes th emodels to a spear and adds spear animations and cooldowns
